summary: Executive user AppleTV+ scheduled/live - Game Tile
description:
GIVEN the user is an Executive user
AND there is a AppleTV+ Game scheduled/in-progress

steps.action: WHEN the user views the AppleTV+ game tile focused or unfocused
steps.result:
THEN the AppleTV+ pill is not displayed in the game tile
AND a lock icon is not displayed in the game tile
AND the team colors in the matchup header do not have a dark overlay
